items.title: Israel and Hezbollah agree ceasefire, US says, as more Lebanon strikes reported
items.summary: The agreement followed concerns that continued clashes would undermine the deal to end the war between the US and Iran.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Mideast Live Updates: Israel Commits to New Lebanon Cease-Fire, Ambassador Says, but Troops Will Remain
items.summary: The fighting between Israel and Hezbollah in Lebanon had delayed the next stage of talks to end the U.S.-Iranian war. Hezbollah did not immediately comment.
